title: Void Dimension
body:
To get to the void dimension, you need a portal out of void blocks, which can be found under y:0. To lit the portal, you need Void Eye. To craft void eye, you need:
- 4 Void blocks
- 1 Ender eye
- 4 Netherite blocks

There will be uniqe items in the dimension, to make it 'Worth' crafting the `Void Eye`. Also, try to find `void water`! It's dangerous, but it will help to navigate arround, because torches don't work in here!

MCreator: [https://mcreator.net/](https://mcreator.net/)
